creator: spamtrap@null.net
text: I'm sure Damjan Jovanovic would be able to explain his patches much better than I can. Also, currently FreeBSD is unable to compete on the same gaming playing field with Linux distributions or Linux based wireless routers. Linux works perfectly with upnp but FreeBSD doesn't with the use of pf. Hopefully we gain some traction on this. Would be very beneficial to gamers who want to use FreeBSD instead of Linux.
